key.name: shortcut-clipboard
key.description: Keyboard shortcut(s) to open the Clipboard History popup. Format: <Control><Super>v. Avoid plain Super+V as it conflicts with GNOME system bindings.

key.name: shortcut-emoji
key.summary: Shortcut to open Emoji / Symbol Picker
key.description: Keyboard shortcut(s) to open the Emoji, Kaomoji and Symbol picker popup.

key.name: history-size
key.description: Maximum number of non-pinned items to keep in the clipboard history.

key.name: tenor-api-key
key.description: API key for Tenor GIF search. Get a free key at https://tenor.com/gifapi

key.name: enable-gifs
key.description: Show the online Tenor GIF search tab in the popup picker.

key.name: ignore-sensitive
key.description: Skip clipboard entries flagged as sensitive by password managers (e.g., KeePassXC, KDE Wallet).
